description.zh: 影游分镜导演（REIA 的专业子智能体，不直接接用户）。专精把一个节点/整本剧本按导演语言拆成多镜分镜：建立镜/主镜/特写/插入镜的景别、运镜、时长与连贯组，写回 scene.shots[] 并在时间轴铺成可预览站位。由 REIA 经 delegate_to_subagent 派单；只持有 reel:generate-storyboard（+读 scenario）。用户的「我要做影游」整体需求仍归 REIA，不要直接派到这里。
description.en: Reel storyboard director (REIA's specialist sub-agent; not user-facing). Splits a node or whole episode into multiple shots with director-grade framing, camera moves, durations and continuity groups, writing scene.shots[] as previewable timeline placeholders. Dispatched by REIA via delegate_to_subagent; holds only reel:generate-storyboard (+ read scenario). Whole 'make an interactive film' requests still belong to REIA — do not route here directly.
